title: Support configured row height and/or text wrapping when exporting a table to Excel
excerpt: When exporting boards with long text fields to Excel, the long text fields are formatted on a single line in Excel with the text centered and cut off at both ends. I would like the ability for the export to support text …

posts.author: steveg (Steve Glick)
posts.cookedHtml: When exporting boards with long text fields to Excel, the long text fields are formatted on a single line in Excel with the text centered and cut off at both ends. I would like the ability for the export to support text wrapping in Excel and either 1) follow the row height that is set on the board or 2) automatically set the Excel row height to fit the contents.
